name: Encore FR Pro WW
comment:
The ADJ Lighting Encore FR Pro WW is a professional grade Fresnel fixture with a 7-inch lens designed for key light, as a fill light and as a back light. It offers a potent 200W warm white LED 
 
The Encore FR Pro Color has a motorized zoom (beam angle of 10~46°), a CRI rating of 97.2 with an output of more than 12,000 Lumens. There are an abundant of on-board features such as 4 DMX control modes, 4 Dim Curves, 6 Dim Modes and adjustable refresh rates.
 
The fixture has DMX-512 and RDM protocols, a USB service port, a 4-Button control panel LCD menu display, 2 rotary controls for Zoom en Dimmer 3 & 5-pin DMX In/Out sockets and locking power In/Out to daisy chain power from one fixture to another. 
 
A rotating 8-leaf barn door, gel frame and power cord are included with the fixture.

capabilities.comment: Random Strobe Effect Slow to Fast
